proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { (x0.first <= x1.first and x0.second <= x1.second) = pair_lte[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](p, q)
function[T0: PartialOrder] { is_transitive[T0](T0.lte) }[A]
function[T0: PartialOrder] { is_transitive[T0](T0.lte) }[B]
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x0 or x0 = x1 }[A](p.first, q.first)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x0 or x0 = x1 }[B](p.second, q.second)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1, x1) } = is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[Pair[A, B]](pair_lte[A, B])
let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { not pair_lte[A, B](w0, w0) }
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { pair_lte[T0, T1](x0, x0) }[A, B](w0)

goal: is_transitive[Pair[A, B]](pair_lte[A, B]) = forall(x0: Pair[A, B], x1: Pair[A, B], x2: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](x0, x1) and pair_lte[A, B](x1, x2) implies pair_lte[A, B](x0, x2) }
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[Pair[A, B]](pair_lte[A, B])
let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[A, B], k1: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](w0, k0) and pair_lte[A, B](k0, k1) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, k1) } }
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k2: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w1) and pair_lte[A, B](w1, k2) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, k2) } }
let w2: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w1) and pair_lte[A, B](w1, w2) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, w2) }
let w3: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k3: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w3) and pair_lte[A, B](w3, k3) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, k3) } }
let w4: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w3) and pair_lte[A, B](w3, w4) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, w4) }
let w5: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w3) and pair_lte[A, B](w3, w5) and not pair_lte[A, B](w0, w5) }

function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1], x2: Pair[T0, T1]) { not pair_lte[T0, T1](x0, x1) or not pair_lte[T0, T1](x1, x2) or pair_lte[T0, T1](x0, x2) }[A, B](w0, w3, w5)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) }[Pair[A, B]](pair_lte[A, B])
let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](w0, k0) and pair_lte[A, B](k0, w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w1) and pair_lte[A, B](w1, w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w2) and pair_lte[A, B](w2, w0) and w2 != w0 }
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Pair[T0, T1], x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { not pair_lte[T0, T1](x0, x1) or not pair_lte[T0, T1](x1, x0) or x0 = x1 }[A, B](w0, w2)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { (is_reflexive[T0](x0) and is_transitive[T0](x0) and is_antisymmetric[T0](x0)) = is_partial_order_relation[T0](x0) }[Pair[A, B]](pair_lte[A, B])

goal: pair_lte[A, B](p, q) = (a <= c and b <= d)
pair_lte[A, B](p, q) = (a <= q.first and b <= q.second)
pair_lte[A, B](p, q) = (p.first <= a and p.second <= b)

goal: pair_lte[B, A](p.swap, q.swap) = pair_lte[A, B](p, q)

proof: let w0: Pair[A, B] satisfy { exists(k0: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[A, B](w0, k0) != pair_lte[B, A](w0.swap, k0.swap) } }
let w1: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w1) != pair_lte[B, A](w0.swap, w1.swap) }
let w2: Pair[A, B] satisfy { pair_lte[A, B](w0, w2) != pair_lte[B, A](w0.swap, w2.swap) }
function(x0: Pair[A, B], x1: Pair[A, B]) { pair_lte[B, A](x0.swap, x1.swap) = pair_lte[A, B](x0, x1) }(w0, w2)
